step_rationale: CLEC4D is a C-type lectin receptor modulating leukocyte and platelet activation in inflammation.
mechanism: CLEC4D is a core gene shared between ischemic stroke and MI; regulates myeloid-cell activation and inflammatory responses in atherothrombosis.

references.title: Identification of core genes shared by ischemic stroke and myocardial infarction using an integrated approach.
